title: anacamptis × parvifolia subsp. bicknellii
intro: Anacamptis × parvifolia subsp. bicknellii, also known as Bicknell's orchid, is a rare and hybrid orchid species. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits associated with Anacamptis × parvifolia subsp. bicknellii include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. However, due to its rarity, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy, and herbal preparations are typically made from other, more readily available species within the Anacamptis genus.
